geography.data_source: BBMP ward boundaries 2023 for core city wards covering MG Road, Brigade Road, Shivajinagar, and Commercial Street areas

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 ward-level data for Bangalore Urban core wards; density computed from population/area; literacy from Karnataka DISE 2021-22; SC/ST from Census 2011 Bangalore Urban district tables

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round PLFS for urban Karnataka core zones; median adjusted for commercial zone premium using CMIE Consumer Pyramids 2023; informal rate reflects mix of formal offices and informal retail from ILO India Employment Report 2024

commute_profile.data_source: BMRCL ridership data 2024 for Purple/Green line interchange stations; DULT CMP 2020 for CBD commute patterns; car ownership constrained by parking scarcity per BBMP parking policy 2022

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: fare_sensitivity moderate — mixed income zone; high diffusion due to commercial density and footfall; political_mobilisation elevated — proximity to Vidhana Soudha; estimated from Lokniti-CSDS 2024 urban Karnataka and NSSO consumption data

social_network_parameters.data_source: High cross-income bridging due to commercial interactions across income strata; lower clustering from transient population; estimated from IHDS-II urban core social network patterns

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Commercial Street traders association estimate 2023; transit dependency from BMTC/BMRCL modal share data for MG Road metro catchment
BBMP trade license data 2023; Russell Market heritage market footfall estimated from APMC records and BBMP vendor counts
Estimated from BBMP food license data 2022 for Brigade Road stretch; footfall from BTP crowd management reports for weekend peaks

data_source: Composite zone config from Census 2011, NSSO PLFS 78th Round, BMRCL 2024, DULT CMP 2020, BBMP 2023 ward data, CMIE Consumer Pyramids 2023, BTP crowd management reports
